architectures.structured_head: one affine vector head ordered center_J,radius_J,center_T,radius_T; radius coordinates rectified
architectures.cross_entropy_head: one affine three-logit K3 head on an atom-conditioned row

optimization_clarifications.20-A1: The registered 200-epoch structured maximum is split prospectively into at most 100 center epochs followed by at most 100 radius epochs. The trunk and center rows are restored exactly during radius optimization, so the center mapping remains frozen.
optimization_clarifications.20-A2: The registered batch size is 512 independent worlds. Each epoch takes one J and one T probe per selected world under a deterministic cycle that covers all 80 panel positions; validation is every 5 epochs and patience remains 20 epochs.
optimization_clarifications.20-A3: All 18 grid points are run once per arm with selection seed 101. A common final parameter budget minimizes summed within-arm relative regret; each arm chooses its own learning rate and weight decay within that shared budget. Eight paired final fits then use seeds 101,211,307,401,503,601,701,809.
optimization_clarifications.20-A4: Calibration uses exactly one pre-target hash-selected eligible probe per schema per calibration world, sampled proportional to the frozen joint target/design weight. Thus each schema has 5000 independent calibration scores rather than treating 200000 correlated atom rows as exchangeable.
optimization_clarifications.20-A5: The boundary endpoint is a deterministic four-query panel at upper+0.25 sigma, upper equality, midpoint crossing, and lower-0.25 sigma over the same frozen world/plan/statistic law; the random strict strata alone have probability zero of exactly realizing the .25 cutoff.
optimization_clarifications.20-A6: Tolerance transfer shifts each original declared threshold by d sigma for d in {-2,-1.5,1.5,2}. Monotonic upper-bound semantics structurally exclude Supported cells at negative shifts and Refuted cells at positive shifts, so the macro average is over the 16 realized schema/state/offset cells, not eight impossible Cartesian cells. No margin or null is changed.
optimization_clarifications.20-A7: Paired arms draw a common parent trunk per fit seed and slice the declared width; arm-specific head streams are isolated. At the 20k budget the 127-wide structured trunk is the exact shared prefix of the 128-wide CE trunk.

required_ablations.structured: accepted learned radius plus held-out expansion
required_ablations.cross_entropy: independent direct K3 logits with exact usability/polarity overrides
required_ablations.center_only: zero learned radius plus its own common-convention accepted held-out expansion
required_ablations.unaccepted_radius: production value always Open; shadow K3 reported only for fit comparison
required_ablations.self_confidence: intentionally invalid confidence-as-authorization; production_active is always false

exact_after_learning: evidence presence, validity, currency, checker binding, and polarity
profile meet and four public outcomes
simultaneous active sets and empty-set fallback
exact active masking and inactive selection probability zero
semantic_boundary.positive_relu_meaning: only positive preactivation or a specifically named positive margin; never a grant by itself

trace_schema.format: 100-world per-fit-seed compressed NPZ shards plus this schema and deterministic manifest regeneration
trace_schema.identity: role, fit seed, shard world range, row order, frozen generator, and manifests recover world/trajectory/provenance/plan-family roots and atom/request addresses
contains: raw structured vector and CE logits
reference and predicted K3 for in-regime, boundary, and transfer panels
signed support/refutation margins and paired ReLUs
center-only, unaccepted-shadow, unaccepted-production, and invalid-self-confidence states
request atom K3, WF-derived public outcomes, exact masks, and routes
fit/model/calibration hashes through fit marker and shard manifest
trace_schema.evaluation_join: reference columns are joined only after model fitting/calibration and final prediction; no joined column is a scorer input

covers: invalid local certificate and cycle rejection

entry_point.final_guard: final worlds are first materialized only after frozen source verification, grid selection, eight paired fits, separate calibration, model serialization, and a hashed fit-complete marker
entry_point.rerun: existing fit marker, model artifact, or raw result causes refusal
